description: Interactive show-only command that shows the specified shapes and hides everything else. Creates a mutator icon button. show() always uses show-only behavior. Auto-clears after t() duration (default 5 seconds). Triggered by clicking the mutator icon.
utility: Show specified shapes and hide everything else (show-only mode)

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: One or more variable references to shapes to show - all other shapes will be hidden

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Auto-clear duration. t(0) = permanent. Defaults to 5 seconds. After clearing, all shapes return to their original visibility.

alternates.description: Show only A and B, hide everything else (auto-clears after 5s)
Show only A and B for 10 seconds, then restore all
Show only A and B permanently until manually cleared
Same as show(A, B) — type(only) is accepted but optional

examples.scenario: Focus on a triangle and its label
Show only a graph and specific shapes permanently
